name: python3-croniter
title: python3-croniter
summary: provides iteration for datetime object with cron like format - Python 3.x
description:
provides iteration for datetime object with cron like format - Python 3.x
Croniter is a Python module to provide iteration for datetime object. Given a
cron tab text entry as input, it Croniter will output all the dates matching
the definition.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-croniter because provides iteration for datetime object with cron like format - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-croniter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-croniter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-croniter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
